meaning: v.(指鸭)呷呷地叫,大声闲聊,吹嘘n.(鸭子)呷呷叫声,庸医,骗子adj.骗人
examples: When his seawater rice research was successful, he was very excited, and copied the action of ducks with "quack, quack, quack", while passing a pond.
Quack, quack, quack. Walk like us!
Watchdogs may be helpless to stop the electronic sale of quack treatments or dodgy investment schemes.
Zuna also noted that Gottfried had not provided the quack for the Japanese version of the Aflac duck.
